pages.notes: Top of page is cut off; item 1 is not fully visible. Item 9 has a word crossed out after 'Geoux' — could read 'Geouxtes' or similar. Item 10 sub-entry 'John'sGripe' is unclear — possibly a campsite name or annotation. Item 21 first place could read 'Guavecourt' or 'Guavecourt'. The right margin contains a second column of index page numbers (30–53) without associated place names visible in this half; those entries continue on the right page.

pages.notes: This is a continuation of the index from the left page. Entry 37 'La Vielle Norte' may be 'La Vieille Norte' or similar. Entry 38 'Fridefont' could be 'Tridefort' — the first letter is ambiguous. Entry 45 first place 'Cassianoug' is uncertain — could be 'Cassaniouq' or similar; second place 'Calvinet' could be 'Calonat' or 'Calvinet'. Entry 49 'Bas Nouc' is uncertain. Entry 57 'Varaison La Romaine' likely means 'Vaison La Romaine'. Entry 62 'G Golf Juan' — 'G' likely abbreviates 'Golf' (Golf Juan). Entry 63 'Sospely' likely 'Sospel'. Entry 66 'Fenestrelli' likely 'Fenestrelle'. Entry 68 'St. Rompart' is unclear — may be 'St. Rampart' or a French place name.
